task_description.description: Short description of the workplace task.
task_description.title: Task Description

workplace_setting.description: Short workplace-setting label such as janitorial closet or production line.
workplace_setting.title: Workplace Setting

task_duration_hours.description: Task duration relevant to the future Tier 2 worker model.
task_duration_hours.title: Task Duration Hours

ventilation_context.description: Ventilation/control state declared for the worker task.

local_controls.description: Engineering or administrative controls explicitly present during the task.
local_controls.title: Local Controls

respiratory_protection.description: Respiratory protection state if explicitly known.
respiratory_protection.title: Respiratory Protection

emission_descriptor.description: Short free-text description of the emitted mist, vapor, or aerosol context.
emission_descriptor.title: Emission Descriptor

notes.description: Additional worker-task notes preserved for adapter review.
notes.title: Notes
